creator: swear@aa.net
text:
The man page doesn't explain that it is requires user input after it
starts.

I wasted much time trying to determine, by reading the man page, how to
supply it the information needed to set a keymap or font.  I suppose the
"front end" phrase should have clued me in, but it was not clear enough
for me.

I suspect that the problem is shared by the kbdcontrol(1) and
vidcontrol(1) pages too, but I haven't looked.
================

Fix: I'm sure that much could be usefully added to this brief man page by an
interested person.  Here's my small contribution:

patch -d "some man/man1/" < this-PR
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
